text:
Europe/Paris is UTC+0:52 (approx) in 1504 (pre-standardization, using LMT).  
US/Pacific is UTC-7:52 (approx) for that era (LMT offset).  
Time difference = (-7:52) - (0:52) = -8 hours.  
8 AM July 11, 1504 Paris → subtract 8 hours → 12:00 AM (midnight) July 11, 1504 US/Pacific.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 00:00 July 11, 1504
